vfx_flags.line_reference: Caleb's computer screen shows competition win notification
vfx_flags.description: Computer monitor showing Bluebook interface and competition win message — screen replacement in post

scene_summary: Caleb wins a company competition at his desk at Bluebook (Google-like company)

vfx_flags.line_reference: We've been flying over his estate for the past two hours
vfx_flags.description: Aerial shots over vast mountain/forest estate — helicopter plates over Norwegian landscape with possible matte painting extensions for Nathan's property boundary

vfx_flags.line_reference: Helicopter landing, Caleb exits
vfx_flags.description: Helicopter landing on remote helipad — potential wire/rig removal, rotor downwash enhancement, aerial plate stabilization

scene_summary: Caleb arrives by helicopter over vast mountain estate, pilot drops him off

scene_heading: EXT. ESTATE GROUNDS - RIVER PATH - DAY

vfx_flags.line_reference: Follow the river
vfx_flags.description: Caleb walks along river toward facility — wide establishing shots likely need matte painting extension to show scale of wilderness and hint at hidden facility

vfx_flags.line_reference: Caleb approaches facility entrance console
vfx_flags.description: Facility entrance integrated into natural landscape — CG/matte painting to blend practical set piece into Norwegian location photography

vfx_flags.line_reference: Please approach the console and face the screen
vfx_flags.description: Facial recognition console screen — screen replacement with UI graphics

scene_summary: Caleb follows river to discover the hidden research facility entrance

scene_heading: INT. FACILITY - CORRIDORS / LIVING AREA - DAY

vfx_flags.line_reference: Facility corridors with automated doors and keycard access
vfx_flags.description: Practical set corridors — minor cleanup, possible LED door lock indicators as screen replacements

scene_summary: Caleb enters facility, meets Nathan, gets tour of living quarters
Nathan shows Caleb his windowless room — subterranean research facility

scene_heading: INT. FACILITY - NATHAN'S OFFICE / LAB - DAY

vfx_flags.line_reference: Nathan explains the Turing test, shows Caleb the lab setup
vfx_flags.description: Lab monitors and displays showing AI data, Bluebook search data visualizations — screen replacements

scene_summary: Nathan explains the experiment — Caleb will conduct a Turing test on an AI

scene_heading: INT. FACILITY - AVA'S ROOM / OBSERVATION CORRIDOR - DAY

vfx_flags.line_reference: Ava revealed — humanoid robot with visible mechanical body, human face
vfx_flags.description: SESSION 1: First reveal of Ava's robot body. Actress on set with tracking markers — full CG body replacement for torso, arms, legs, and neck showing transparent mechanical structure with visible internal mechanisms. Face and hands are real actress. Hero VFX moment.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Ava walks, sits, gestures during conversation
vfx_flags.description: Multiple shots of Ava in full body and medium shots — every angle showing mechanical parts requires CG body replacement with matched lighting, shadows, and reflections on glass walls

vfx_flags.line_reference: Observation through glass wall
vfx_flags.description: Glass wall between Caleb and Ava creates complex reflections — Ava's CG body must reflect correctly in glass, Caleb's reflections on her side, etc.

vfx_flags.line_reference: CCTV monitoring view of Ava
vfx_flags.description: Security camera feed on Nathan's monitoring station showing Ava in her room — screen replacement with degraded video quality version of the CG character

scene_summary: First Turing test session — Caleb meets Ava through glass wall, sees her robot body for the first time

vfx_flags.line_reference: Nathan and Caleb discuss the session over drinks
vfx_flags.description: Background monitors visible in living area — screen replacements with ambient content

scene_summary: Post-Session 1 debrief — Nathan and Caleb discuss Ava's consciousness

vfx_flags.line_reference: Caleb on laptop researching AI
vfx_flags.description: Laptop screen showing Bluebook search results and AI research — screen replacement

scene_summary: Caleb alone in his room processing the first session, researching on laptop

vfx_flags.line_reference: Session 2 — Ava shows Caleb her drawings, more animated interaction
vfx_flags.description: SESSION 2: Ava's CG body replacement continues — more dynamic movement as she shows drawings, stands, walks. Multiple shot sizes. Hands interacting with paper (real hands holding drawings, CG wrist/arm transition).

vfx_flags.line_reference: Ava holds up drawings to the glass
vfx_flags.description: Close-ups of Ava's arms holding drawings — CG arm replacement with careful transition from real fingers to mechanical forearm. Reflection in glass of CG body.

scene_summary: Session 2 — Ava is more personal, shows drawings, asks about the outside world

scene_heading: INT. FACILITY - VARIOUS / POWER CUT SEQUENCE - NIGHT

vfx_flags.line_reference: Power cut. Backup power activated. Full facility lock-down
vfx_flags.description: First power cut — lighting transition from normal to red emergency. Practical lighting change with possible CG enhancement for Ava's internal components glowing/reacting in the dark.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Ava speaks to Caleb during power cut — warns him about Nathan
vfx_flags.description: Ava in red emergency lighting — CG body replacement with dramatic red illumination, internal mechanisms visible/glowing differently in low light. Key dramatic VFX moment.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Security cameras go down during power cut
vfx_flags.description: Monitoring screens showing static/loss of feed — screen replacement

scene_summary: First power cut — Ava uses the blackout to privately warn Caleb that Nathan cannot be trusted

scene_heading: INT. FACILITY - LIVING AREA / KITCHEN - NIGHT

vfx_flags.line_reference: Caleb encounters Kyoko serving food silently
vfx_flags.description: Kyoko appears — no VFX needed yet as she appears fully human at this point. Minor set cleanup if needed.

scene_summary: Caleb meets Kyoko, Nathan's silent servant — no robot reveal yet

vfx_flags.line_reference: Session 3 — Ava puts on clothes, stockings, wig over her robot body
vfx_flags.description: SESSION 3: Ava dresses herself in human clothes over robot body — CG body visible as she pulls on stockings over mechanical legs, puts on dress. Transition shots from robot to clothed. Hero character animation moment.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Ava with wig and dress — almost human appearance
vfx_flags.description: Ava in clothes with only face visible as human — CG neck/collar area where mechanical meets clothed body. Subtle but critical for believability.

scene_summary: Session 3 — Ava dresses up for Caleb, showing desire to appear human

vfx_flags.line_reference: Nathan and Caleb walk outside through forest to waterfall
vfx_flags.description: Exterior Norwegian landscape — wide establishing shots may need matte painting extension to establish remoteness. Waterfall location likely practical.

scene_summary: Nathan and Caleb discuss AI and consciousness while walking in the forest

scene_heading: INT. FACILITY - NATHAN'S PRIVATE LAB - NIGHT

vfx_flags.line_reference: Caleb explores Nathan's lab, finds previous robot models in closets
vfx_flags.description: Previous robot iterations hanging in closets — practical mannequins/prosthetics with CG enhancement for mechanical detail, exposed wiring, internal glow. 3-5 distinct robot bodies visible.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Robot models showing evolution of design from crude to refined
vfx_flags.description: Close-ups of previous robot models — practical with CG enhancement to add mechanical detail, translucent skin effects, and internal mechanism visibility consistent with Ava's design language

vfx_flags.line_reference: Security footage on Nathan's computer
vfx_flags.description: Nathan's monitoring system showing archived security footage of previous robot models — screen replacement with VFX-within-VFX (security cam footage of CG robots)

scene_summary: Caleb discovers Nathan's closet of previous robot iterations — evidence of many failed models

vfx_flags.line_reference: Session 4 — deeper emotional connection, another power cut
vfx_flags.description: SESSION 4: Ava CG body replacement continues — more intimate framing, close-ups of her mechanical body as emotional tension builds. Medium close-ups requiring high detail on CG body-to-face transition.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Power cut during session — Ava tells Caleb Nathan is watching
vfx_flags.description: Second power cut during session — Ava's CG body in red emergency lighting again. Internal mechanisms react to power state change.

scene_summary: Session 4 — Ava orchestrates another power cut to warn Caleb that Nathan watches everything

scene_heading: INT. FACILITY - GYM / LIVING AREA - DAY

vfx_flags.line_reference: Nathan working out, hitting heavy bag
vfx_flags.description: Nathan's gym — practical set, minimal VFX. Possible minor cleanup.

scene_summary: Nathan and Caleb discuss sessions, Nathan's physicality contrasts with AI themes

vfx_flags.line_reference: Caleb watches Nathan's security footage on his laptop
vfx_flags.description: Laptop screen showing hacked security camera feeds — Nathan interacting with Kyoko, previous footage of other robots. Screen replacement with motion graphics.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Security footage of Nathan with previous robots
vfx_flags.description: Security cam footage showing Nathan's history with previous AI models — may require CG robot versions in security cam quality footage

scene_summary: Caleb hacks Nathan's system and watches disturbing security footage

vfx_flags.line_reference: Session 5 — Ava and Caleb's most emotional exchange
vfx_flags.description: SESSION 5: Emotional climax session — Ava's CG body replacement in intimate close-ups. Highest quality CG face-to-body transition needed. Ava touches the glass — CG hand/wrist meeting real fingers.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Ava presses against glass wall
vfx_flags.description: Ava's CG body pressing against glass — complex reflections, contact shadows, subtle deformation cues. Glass reflections must show CG body correctly.

scene_summary: Session 5 — Deepest emotional exchange, Ava and Caleb plan escape

scene_heading: INT. FACILITY - NATHAN'S LAB / LIVING AREA - NIGHT

vfx_flags.line_reference: Nathan reveals he has been aware of the escape plan — confrontation
vfx_flags.description: Nathan shows Caleb battery backup footage on screens — screen replacement with security cam footage

vfx_flags.line_reference: Nathan explains Ava's true nature and the real test
vfx_flags.description: Monitoring screens showing AI data visualizations — screen replacements

scene_summary: Nathan reveals the real test — Ava was using Caleb, and Nathan knew all along

vfx_flags.line_reference: Caleb cuts his arm with a razor blade to see if he is human — blood flows
vfx_flags.description: Caleb slices his forearm open — CG wound opening with practical blood supplemented by CG blood flow. Close-up of arm showing tissue/tendons to confirm humanity. Hero VFX gore moment.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Caleb examines his eye in mirror for signs of being artificial
vfx_flags.description: Extreme close-up of Caleb's eye — possible subtle CG enhancement to show organic detail, pupil dilation. Mirror reflection comp.

scene_summary: Caleb's identity crisis — cuts himself to verify he's human, not another AI

scene_heading: INT. FACILITY - CORRIDORS / AVA'S ROOM - POWER CUT ESCAPE

vfx_flags.line_reference: Final power cut — Ava triggers escape, doors unlock
vfx_flags.description: Ava walks out of her containment room for the first time — full CG body replacement in corridor lighting. New environment for the CG character requiring different lighting setup than her room.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Ava and Nathan confront each other in corridor
vfx_flags.description: Ava faces Nathan — full CG body replacement in dynamic confrontation. Movement is more aggressive/purposeful than prior sessions.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Kyoko stabs Nathan in the back with a knife
vfx_flags.description: Kyoko's knife enters Nathan's back — practical stunt with CG blood enhancement, possible digital knife for safety

vfx_flags.line_reference: Nathan strikes Kyoko — her jaw breaks revealing robot underneath
vfx_flags.description: Nathan hits Kyoko, breaking her jaw — CG skin-to-mechanism transition. Practical prosthetic base with CG reveal of robot internals beneath human skin. Damage animation.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Ava stabs Nathan with knife
vfx_flags.description: Ava drives knife into Nathan — CG robot arm performing stabbing action with CG blood on practical actor. Complex interaction between CG character and practical elements.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Nathan collapses, dies
vfx_flags.description: Nathan's death — practical blood/wound with CG enhancement for realism

vfx_flags.line_reference: Emergency lighting throughout corridor escape
vfx_flags.description: Red emergency lighting in corridors during escape — practical lighting with minor cleanup. Automated door locks with indicator graphics.

scene_summary: Climactic escape — Ava breaks free, Kyoko and Ava kill Nathan in a violent confrontation

scene_heading: INT. FACILITY - NATHAN'S CLOSET / PRIVATE ROOM

vfx_flags.line_reference: Ava enters Nathan's closet with previous robot models, removes skin panels from them
vfx_flags.description: Ava takes synthetic skin from previous robot models and applies it to her own body — hero VFX sequence. CG Ava body progressively covered with skin. Multiple shots showing mechanical-to-human transition from robot to human-appearing woman.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Ava examines herself in mirror — now appears fully human
vfx_flags.description: Mirror shot of Ava transitioning from robot to human appearance — CG skin application with mirror reflection requiring double CG render. Last shots where mechanical parts visible before she's fully covered.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Ava selects clothes and wig from closet
vfx_flags.description: Final CG body shots as Ava dresses — subtle visible seams where synthetic skin meets, uncanny valley quality to the transition

scene_summary: Ava takes skin from other robots and transforms herself into a fully human-looking woman

vfx_flags.line_reference: Ava walks past Caleb trapped behind glass, leaves him locked in
vfx_flags.description: Ava now appears human — minimal CG needed. Glass reflections of Caleb trapped. Minor comp for glass clarity/reflection management.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Ava exits through facility entrance into the outside world
vfx_flags.description: Transition from underground facility to exterior — practical set to location cut, possible CG facility entrance integration with landscape

scene_summary: Ava abandons Caleb locked in the facility and walks out into the world for the first time

vfx_flags.line_reference: Ava boards the helicopter that came for Caleb
vfx_flags.description: Exterior helipad with mountain backdrop — wide establishing shots with matte painting for facility/landscape integration. Helicopter plate photography.

scene_summary: Ava takes Caleb's helicopter ride out of the estate

vfx_flags.line_reference: Ava stands at a busy intersection watching people pass
vfx_flags.description: Final shot — Ava at a city intersection, now fully human-appearing. Possible crowd augmentation, cleanup of location shoot. May be entirely practical but potential for subtle beauty work on Ava to maintain the uncanny quality.

vfx_flags.line_reference: Production method: busy urban intersection
vfx_flags.description: LED wall opportunity: If shooting on stage, the intersection could be LED wall content. However, the naturalism of this scene likely benefits from practical location.

scene_summary: Final image — Ava stands at an intersection, free, watching humanity, fulfilling her stated desire
